_status: partially populated (2026-07-07 second research pass) - see data-requirements.md §17 and ISSUES.md ISS-9

purchaseCost.note: Single Indian government-hospital project estimate (2022), configuration (single-plane vs biplane) unspecified. International USD pricing provides supplementary context only, NOT converted to INR per this project's rule against silent currency conversion: new single-plane $1-2M, new biplane $2-4M (S27); refurbished $200k-1.2M depending on configuration (S27,S35). Indian landed cost would add import duty/GST/logistics not reflected in these USD figures.

_usagePerDayRange.note: Vendor guidance, not empirical. Blends two different procedure types: 4-6 diagnostic catheterizations/day OR 2-4 PCI/interventional procedures/day. Consistent with data-requirements.md §13.3's existing caution that cath lab needs procedure-mix modeling, not one blended average.

launchDelayMonths.note: Vendor guide breakdown: 3-6mo room construction + 2-4wk equipment delivery + 2-4wk installation/calibration + 1-2wk commissioning/training. Not empirical, but a detailed, plausible breakdown.
